face.shape: soft oval face with balanced narrow proportions
face.jawline: soft tapered jawline with refined chin

eyes.shape: almond eyes with a calm level gaze
eyes.color: warm light brown to hazel brown

distinguishing_marks: small subtle beauty mark near the lower left side of the face close to the mouth area
very clean blunt bob line at the jaw

shot_plan.intent: Amy in a bathroom GRWM setup, minimal clean beauty energy, believable iPhone capture with lived-in bathroom realism.

prompt_stack.character_lock: Actor lock: Amy, seed ugc_amy_seed_51704, soft oval face with balanced narrow proportions, refined soft tapered jawline, almond hazel-brown eyes, neutral warm ivory skin tone #E9D8CB with natural satin finish, light platinum blonde sleek blunt bob, chin-length, deep side part, subtle beauty mark near the lower left side of the face close to the mouth area, clean blunt bob edge at the jaw.
prompt_stack.scenario: Scenario: Amy is in a bathroom during a get-ready-with-me moment, standing in front of the mirror holding her phone naturally, soft calm expression, minimal beauty styling, polished but intimate daily-routine energy, not editorial or over-posed, believable beauty creator content.
prompt_stack.environment: Environment: modern bathroom with a mirror, sink counter, a few skincare or makeup items casually placed, realistic countertop reflections, soft towels or grooming items in the background, mixed bathroom lighting with daylight spill and warmer practical light, clean but lived-in GRWM setting.
prompt_stack.camera: Camera: simulated mirror selfie iPhone capture, vertical composition, medium crop from chest to head, phone visible, slight perspective distortion from mirror reflection, realistic bathroom hotspot clipping, consumer HDR with mixed white balance and practical-light inconsistency.
prompt_stack.realism_injection: Realism injection: visible fine skin pores and facial texture, a few tiny stray blonde hairs around the crown and side part, under-eye texture with soft natural shadow depth, slightly uneven skin tone around nostrils and eyes, white high-neck top fabric texture with natural folds, environmental noise with faint grain and mirror texture, lighting imperfection from warm bathroom practicals and cool ambient daylight, camera artifacts with smartphone sharpening halos and slight compression, nail detail on the hand holding the phone, realistic object and jewelry behavior if visible, mirror surface with subtle smudge or dust logic.
